stem.zh:
关于使用生成式AI产生的生成物的处理，下列哪一项可能需要取得既有著作物的著作权人的许可？请选出全部符合的项。

a　为了获得与喜爱的艺术家的乐曲相似的音乐而使用生成式AI生成乐曲，并将该乐曲上传到互联网上免费公开。
b　为了获得与喜爱的艺术家的乐曲相似的音乐而使用生成式AI生成乐曲，并将该乐曲保存在自己的PC上供个人欣赏。
c　使用生成式AI生成音乐时，偶然生成了与喜爱的艺术家的乐曲相似的音乐，于是将其保存在自己的PC上供个人欣赏。
stem.en:
Regarding the handling of outputs produced using generative AI, which of the following may require obtaining permission from the copyright holder of an existing copyrighted work? Choose the option that lists all such cases.

a  Using generative AI to generate a piece of music so that it resembles a song by a favorite artist, then uploading that music to the Internet and making it freely available to the public.
b  Using generative AI to generate a piece of music so that it resembles a song by a favorite artist, then storing that music on one's own PC and listening to it personally.
c  When generating music with generative AI, a piece of music that happened to resemble a song by a favorite artist was generated, so it was stored on one's own PC and listened to personally.

ア.zh: a
ア.en: a

イ.zh: a，b
イ.en: a, b

ウ.zh: a，b，c
ウ.en: a, b, c

エ.zh: b，c
エ.en: b, c

stem.zh:
投资公司A公司在采取各自投资战略时的利润预测如表所示。当A公司采取最大化最小值（maximin）战略，且市场行情好转时，利润是多少？最大化最小值战略是指：选取使各战略所预期利润的最小值达到最大的战略的理论。

|  | 市场行情好转 | 市场行情恶化 |
|---|---|---|
| 投资战略 a | 20 | −15 |
| 投资战略 b | 5 | 0 |
stem.en:
Company A, an investment firm, forecasts the profit for each of its investment strategies as shown in the table. When Company A adopts the maximin strategy and the market improves, what is the profit? The maximin strategy is the theory of selecting the strategy so that the minimum of the expected profits for each strategy becomes the largest.

|  | Market improves | Market worsens |
|---|---|---|
| Investment strategy a | 20 | −15 |
| Investment strategy b | 5 | 0 |

stem.zh: 关于数字化转型（Digital Transformation）的说明，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of digital transformation (DX)?

ア.zh: 能够熟练使用 PC、智能手机等数字产品的人，与无法熟练使用的人之间，在各种机会上产生差距，进而导致社会层面的不平等。
ア.en: A situation where gaps arise in various opportunities between people who can skillfully use digital products such as PCs and smartphones and those who cannot, leading to social inequality.

イ.zh: 指自出生起，互联网以及 PC、智能手机等数字产品就近在身边，在使用这些产品的环境中成长起来的一代人。
イ.en: A generation that, from birth, has had the Internet and digital products such as PCs and smartphones close at hand and grew up using them.

ウ.zh: 为了将来自麦克风等收集声音的设备的模拟信号保存为电子文件，而将其转换为数字信号。
ウ.en: Converting analog signals from devices such as microphones that collect sound into digital signals in order to store them as electronic files.

エ.zh: 数字技术对人类的生活、商业等各个方面产生影响，并带来变革。
エ.en: Digital technology affecting every aspect of human life, business, and so on, and bringing about transformation.

stem.en: There is a technique called "Value Engineering" that grasps the value of a product or service in terms of the relationship between function and cost, and aims to improve value. Which of the following correctly expresses the relationship among value, function, and cost in Value Engineering?

ア.zh: 价值 ＝ 功能 ／（成本 ＋ 功能）

イ.zh: 价值 ＝ 功能 ／ 成本

ウ.zh: 价值 ＝ 功能 × 成本
ウ.en: Value = Function × Cost

エ.zh: 价值 ＝ 成本 ／ 功能
エ.en: Value = Cost / Function

stem.zh: 关于个人信息保护法所规定的匿名加工信息（匿名加工情报）的说明，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of anonymously processed information (anonymized information) as defined in the Act on the Protection of Personal Information?

ア.zh: 将厚生劳动省、总务省统计局等公开的统计信息加工成适合本公司使用的形式，并与本公司所持有的信息相关联，从而赋予其新价值的信息。
ア.en: Information obtained by processing statistical information published by bodies such as the Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare or the Statistics Bureau of the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications to suit one's own company, and linking it to information the company holds to give it new value.

イ.zh: 对个人信息中的姓名按照一定规则进行匿名化，但保留可还原为原始个人信息能力的信息。
イ.en: Information in which the names within personal information are anonymized according to certain rules, but the ability to restore it to the original personal information is preserved.

ウ.zh: 按照法律法规规定的方法将个人信息匿名化，使其无法被还原，并可在一定规则下未经本人同意而加以利用的信息。
ウ.en: Information in which personal information has been anonymized by a method prescribed by law so that it cannot be restored, and which can be utilized without the consent of the individual under certain rules.

エ.zh: 在向用户收集个人信息时，不获取姓名，而是通过个人编号等其他信息来识别个人后所收集的信息。
エ.en: Information collected from users without obtaining their names, instead enabling identification of the individual by other information such as a personal identification number.

ア.en: A proposal document created by an IT vendor in order to suggest to the user the necessity of developing an information system.

stem.zh: 下列哪一项说明了《网络安全基本法》的立法宗旨？
stem.en: Which of the following describes the legislative intent of the Cybersecurity Basic Act?

ア.zh: 定义对计算机的非法访问行为并予以禁止，同时设定罚则，以维护网络通信秩序。
ア.en: To define and prohibit unauthorized access to computers, while establishing penalties, in order to maintain order in network communications.

イ.zh: 制定建立和运营适当信息安全控制措施的实践规范，促进企业等切实推进有效的信息安全对策。
イ.en: To establish a practical code for implementing and operating appropriate information security controls, and to promote effective information security measures at enterprises and other organizations.

ウ.zh: 针对通过信息通信网络对计算机进行非法入侵等行为的防御措施，确立基本理念，明确国家及地方公共团体的责任等，以谋求综合且有效地推进相关对策。
ウ.en: To establish basic principles for defensive measures against acts such as unauthorized intrusion into computers via information and communication networks, to clarify the responsibilities of the national and local governments, and to promote such measures comprehensively and effectively.

エ.zh: 通过规制使数字内容复制防护的技术性限制手段失效等行为，确保企业等的经营性利益。
エ.en: To secure the business interests of enterprises and others by regulating acts such as circumventing the technical protection measures that prevent copying of digital content.

c 及时掌握共享磁盘的使用量，使容量不足的征兆能够被尽早察觉。

b Identify the cause of the shared disk usage reaching its upper limit, and consider measures to prevent recurrence.
c Grasp the usage of the shared disk in a timely manner so that signs of capacity shortage can be detected early.
d Immediately proceed with the procedures to expand the shared disk.

イ.en: b, d

ウ.en: c

エ.zh: c, d
エ.en: c, d

stem.zh:
过程 sort 接收一个元素数为2以上的整数型数组作为参数 numberArray，并输出将其元素按升序排列后的结果。为了确认过程 sort 的运行情况，在处理过程中输出 j 的值和 workArray 的所有元素。设数组 numberArray 为 {3, 5, 1, 2, 4}，以 sort(numberArray) 的形式调用过程 sort 时，在输出 j 的值为3之后紧接着输出的 workArray 的所有元素是哪一项？这里，数组的元素编号从1开始。

〔程序〕
○sort(整数型数组: numberArray)
  整数型: minIndex, j, k
  整数型数组: workArray ← numberArray  // 复制数组
  for (j 从 1 到 (workArray 的元素数 − 1) 每次增加 1)
    // 在从第 j 个到末尾的元素中，求出值最小的元素的元素编号（取一个）
    minIndex ← j
    for (k 从 (j + 1) 到 workArray 的元素数 每次增加 1)
      if (workArray[k] 小于 workArray[minIndex])
        minIndex ← k
      endif
    endfor
    交换 workArray[j] 与 workArray[minIndex] 的值
    // 为确认运行情况，输出 j 的值和 workArray 的所有元素
    输出 j 的值
    将 workArray 的所有元素从头开始依次以逗号分隔输出
  endfor
  将 workArray 的所有元素从头开始依次以逗号分隔输出

|   | A | B | C | D |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 4's place | 2's place | 1's place |   |
| 2 |   | 0 |   | : carry from the 1's place |

stem.zh:
函数 isPrime 当作为参数给定的正整数为素数时返回 true，不是素数时返回 false 作为返回值。例如，以 isPrime(2) 调用函数 isPrime 时的返回值为 true。在程序中填入 a、b 处的字句，恰当的组合是哪一个？

〔程序〕
○逻辑型: isPrime(整数型: num)
　整数型: div ← 2
　if (num 　2　[　a　])
　　return false
　else
　　while (num 　div　[　b　])
　　　if (num ÷ div 的余数等于 0)
　　　　return false
　　　else
　　　　div ← div + 1
　　　endif
　　endwhile
　　return true
　endif
stem.en:
The function isPrime returns true when the positive integer given as an argument is a prime number, and returns false when it is not a prime number. For example, the return value when the function isPrime is called as isPrime(2) is true. Which combination of tokens to fill in a and b in the program is appropriate?

[Program]
○Boolean type: isPrime(Integer type: num)
　Integer type: div ← 2
　if (num is 2 [ a ])
　　return false
　else
　　while (num is div [ b ])
　　　if (the remainder of num ÷ div equals 0)
　　　　return false
　　　else
　　　　div ← div + 1
　　　endif
　　endwhile
　　return true
　endif

ア.zh: a:小于等于 b:等于
ア.en: a: less than or equal to  b: equal to

イ.zh: a:小于等于 b:大于
イ.en: a: less than or equal to  b: greater than

ウ.zh: a:小于 b:等于
ウ.en: a: less than  b: equal to

エ.zh: a:小于 b:大于
エ.en: a: less than  b: greater than

　　　if (num ÷ div の余り が 0 と等しい)

　　　endif
　　endwhile
　　return true
　endif

stem.zh:
有一种机器人，可以通过编程实现抬笔、落笔、直行以及向右转向的方向变换。我们编写了一个程序，让这个机器人绘制一个边长为 1m 的正六边形。在下面的正六边形绘制程序中，填入 a、b 处字句的适当组合是哪一个？
〔正六边形绘制程序〕
(1) 落笔。
(2) 将处理次数计数器设置为 a。
(3) 按顺序执行以下处理。
　·直行 1m。
　·向右转向 b 度。
　·将处理次数计数器加 1。
(4) 当处理次数计数器小于 6 时，返回 (3)。
(5) 抬笔。
stem.en:
There is a robot that, through programming, can raise and lower a pen, move straight ahead, and turn to change direction clockwise. A program was created to make this robot draw a regular hexagon with sides of 1 m. In the following regular-hexagon drawing program, which is the appropriate combination of words to put into a and b?
[Regular-hexagon drawing program]
(1) Lower the pen.
(2) Set the processing-count counter to a.
(3) Execute the following steps in order.
　- Move straight ahead 1 m.
　- Turn b degrees clockwise to change direction.
　- Add 1 to the processing-count counter.
(4) If the processing-count counter is less than 6, return to (3).
(5) Raise the pen.

守るべき情報資産に対して望ましくない影響を及ぼす可能性のある原因のことを a といい, 情報資産自身の価値を損なう可能性をもつ弱点のことを b という。

stem.zh:
关于信息安全的下列描述中，填入 a、b 处的字句的适当组合是哪一个？
将可能对需要保护的信息资产产生不良影响的原因称为 a，将信息资产自身可能损害其价值的弱点称为 b。
stem.en:
In the following description concerning information security, which is the appropriate combination of words to fill in blanks a and b?
A cause that may have an undesirable effect on the information assets to be protected is called a, and a weakness that may impair the value of the information asset itself is called b.

ア.zh: a：事件 b：风险
ア.en: a: Incident  b: Risk

イ.zh: a：威胁 b：脆弱性
イ.en: a: Threat  b: Vulnerability

ウ.zh: a：脆弱性 b：事件
ウ.en: a: Vulnerability  b: Incident

エ.zh: a：风险 b：威胁
エ.en: a: Risk  b: Threat

stem.zh: 关于 PKI（公钥基础设施）的特征，正确的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is a characteristic of PKI (Public Key Infrastructure)?

ア.zh: 提供了确认共享密钥所有者的方法。
ア.en: It provides a method to verify the owner of a shared (symmetric) key.

イ.zh: 通过"信任之环"——即信任熟人所签名的密钥——来确认公钥的正当性。
イ.en: It verifies that a public key is legitimate through a "web of trust," in which keys signed by acquaintances are trusted.

ウ.zh: 由认证中心担保数字证书的正当性。
ウ.en: A certificate authority guarantees the validity of a digital certificate.

エ.zh: 提供了安全地公开私钥的方法。
エ.en: It provides a method to safely make a private key public.

2026r08-q091.stem_jp_clean: デジタル署名やブロックチェーンで用いられるハッシュ関数には, SHA-256, SHA-512などがある。このようなハッシュ関数に関する記述として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 用于数字签名和区块链的散列函数有 SHA-256、SHA-512 等。关于这类散列函数的描述，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Hash functions used in digital signatures and blockchain include SHA-256, SHA-512, and others. Which of the following is an appropriate description of such hash functions?

ア.zh: 将某个散列函数得到的散列值，再次输入到该散列函数中，就能够还原出原始数据。
ア.en: By inputting a hash value obtained with a certain hash function back into that same hash function, the original data can be restored.

イ.zh: 将相同的数据分别输入到不同的散列函数时，得到的散列值全都相同。
イ.en: When the same data is input into different hash functions, the hash values obtained are all the same.

ウ.zh: 使用同一个散列函数时，只要输入的数据相同，得到的散列值就总是相同。
ウ.en: When the same hash function is used, as long as the input data is the same, the hash value obtained is always the same.

エ.zh: 任何散列函数都各自存在反函数，能够从散列值还原出原始数据。
エ.en: Every hash function has its own inverse function, and the original data can be restored from the hash value.

stem.zh: 作为基于零信任安全理念的信息安全对策示例，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate example of an information security measure based on the zero trust security concept?

ア.zh: 在互联网与内部网络的边界处部署防火墙，在边界处阻断来自互联网的威胁。
ア.en: Place a firewall at the boundary between the Internet and the internal network, and block threats from the Internet at the boundary.

イ.zh: 无论是来自内部网络还是来自外部网络，访问网络上的信息资源时都使用双因素认证。
イ.en: Whether access comes from the internal network or from an external network, use two-factor authentication for access to information resources on the network.

ウ.zh: 当连接到内部网络的PC上安装的软件被发现漏洞时，在其安全补丁发布后立即应用该补丁。
ウ.en: When a vulnerability is found in software installed on a PC connected to the internal network, apply its security patch immediately after the patch is released.

エ.zh: 在连接到内部网络的PC中，仅在访问互联网的PC上安装防恶意软件软件。
エ.en: Among the PCs connected to the internal network, install anti-malware software only on the PCs that access the Internet.

stem.zh: 在以下 ISMS 的实施事项中，最先进行的是哪一项？
stem.en: Among the following ISMS implementation items, which one is performed first?

ア.zh: 确定 ISMS 的适用范围
ア.en: Determining the scope of application of the ISMS

イ.zh: 信息安全风险评估
イ.en: Information security risk assessment

ウ.zh: 信息安全风险应对
ウ.en: Information security risk treatment

エ.zh: 内部审计
エ.en: Internal audit

stem.zh: 将信息安全对策分类为“技术性安全对策”“人员安全对策”和“物理性安全对策”时，作为“物理性安全对策”的示例，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: When information security measures are classified into "technical security measures," "personnel security measures," and "physical security measures," which is an appropriate example of a "physical security measure"?

ア.zh: 针对机密信息的处理，制定包含处罚条款的规章制度，并为使相关人员遵守，定期对其实施教育。
ア.en: Regarding the handling of confidential information, establish rules including penalties, and conduct periodic education for the personnel involved to ensure compliance.

イ.zh: 为使在因灾害发生系统故障时仍能持续提供服务，在异地准备备份系统。
イ.en: Prepare a backup system at a remote location so that service can be continued even if a system failure occurs due to a disaster.

ウ.zh: 为防止因手段日益巧妙的网络攻击造成的损害，向员工普及有关网络攻击的方法和对策的信息。
ウ.en: To prevent damage from increasingly sophisticated cyberattacks, inform employees about the methods of cyberattacks and the countermeasures against them.

エ.zh: 为防止恶意软件造成的损害，引入恶意软件防护软件，并始终将定义文件保持为最新状态。
エ.en: To prevent damage from malware, introduce anti-malware software and always keep the definition files up to date.

stem.zh: 在防范 SQL 注入等场景中使用，为了避免引发处理的误动作，将用户在 Web 网站上输入的内容中所含的有害字符串替换为无害字符串，这种处理称为什么？
stem.en: Used in countermeasures such as those against SQL injection, what is the term for replacing harmful character strings contained in the content that a user enters on a website with harmless character strings, so as not to cause malfunctions in processing?

ア.zh: MAC 地址过滤
ア.en: MAC address filtering

イ.zh: 无害化处理（消毒）
イ.en: Sanitizing

ウ.zh: 条带化
ウ.en: Striping

エ.zh: 社会工程学
エ.en: Social engineering

stem.zh: 以获取机密信息等为目的，针对特定的组织或个人，采用多种攻击手法，在长时间内持续不断地实施攻击——具有这种特征的网络攻击是哪一个？
stem.en: Which cyberattack has the characteristic of being carried out continuously over a long period against a specific organization or individual, using multiple attack methods, with the aim of obtaining confidential information?

ア.zh: APT 攻击
ア.en: APT attack

イ.zh: DDoS 攻击
イ.en: DDoS attack

ウ.zh: 零日攻击
ウ.en: Zero-day attack

エ.zh: 密码列表攻击
エ.en: Password list attack

2026r08-q097.stem_jp_clean:
OSS (Open Source Software) の取扱いに関する記述のうち, 適切なものだけを全て挙げたものはどれか。
a OSS を集めた記録媒体を, 顧客に有償で提供する。
b 改変したOSS を, 特定の利用分野に制限して OSS として提供する。
c 不具合を発見して修正した OSS のソースコードを, 自分の Web サイトで提供する。

stem.zh:
关于开源软件(OSS)处理方式的描述中，仅列出全部恰当项的是哪一个？
a 将收录了 OSS 的记录介质有偿提供给客户。
b 将改写后的 OSS 限制在特定使用领域内，并作为 OSS 提供。
c 将发现缺陷并修复后的 OSS 源代码，发布在自己的 Web 网站上提供。
stem.en:
Among the following statements about handling OSS (Open Source Software), which lists all and only the appropriate ones?
a Providing a recording medium containing collected OSS to customers for a fee.
b Providing modified OSS as OSS while restricting it to a specific field of use.
c Providing the source code of OSS in which a defect was found and fixed, on one's own website.

ア.zh: a
ア.en: a

イ.zh: a, c
イ.en: a, c

ウ.zh: b, c
ウ.en: b, c

エ.zh: c
エ.en: c

stem.zh: 关于 AI 中的提示工程（Prompt engineering）的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of prompt engineering in AI?

ア.zh: AI 从大量的现象或数据中获取普遍性的规则与知识。
ア.en: AI acquiring universal rules and knowledge from a large number of phenomena or data.

イ.zh: 在画面上用符号或字符串表示出当前处于可以输入对 AI 的提问、指示等的状态。
イ.en: Indicating on the screen, using symbols or character strings, that the system is in a state where questions or instructions to the AI can be entered.

ウ.zh: 为了得到符合意图的回答，对向 AI 提出的问题或指示的内容、提供的信息、指定的输出格式等加以斟酌设计。
ウ.en: Devising the content of questions or instructions given to the AI, the information provided, the specification of the output format, and so on, in order to obtain the intended answer.

エ.zh: 用计算机模拟神经细胞所构成的网络、在 AI 中使用的计算模型。
エ.en: A computational model used in AI that imitates, on a computer, the network formed by nerve cells.

2026r08-q099.stem_jp_clean:
入力装置に関する次の記述中の a，b に入れる字句の適切な組合せはどれか。

a は，紙などに光を当て，反射光を読み取り，文字や図形をデジタルデータに変換して PC に取り込む。a が文字や図形をどの程度細かく読み取れるかの性能を示す単位として b が使われる。

stem.zh:
关于输入设备的下列叙述中，填入 a、b 处的字句的恰当组合是哪一项？

a 向纸张等照射光线，读取反射光，将文字或图形转换为数字数据并导入到 PC（个人计算机）中。表示 a 能够多么精细地读取文字或图形的性能的单位为 b。
stem.en:
In the following description about input devices, which is the appropriate combination of words to fill in a and b?

a shines light onto paper or similar media, reads the reflected light, and converts characters or figures into digital data to import them into a PC (Personal Computer). The unit b is used to indicate how finely a can read characters or figures.

ア.zh: a: 图像扫描仪 / b: bps
ア.en: a: Image Scanner / b: bps

イ.zh: a: 图像扫描仪 / b: dpi
イ.en: a: Image Scanner / b: dpi

ウ.zh: a: 屏幕阅读器 / b: bps
ウ.en: a: Screen Reader / b: bps

エ.zh: a: 屏幕阅读器 / b: dpi
エ.en: a: Screen Reader / b: dpi

stem.zh: 关于 ISMS 活动的描述，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of ISMS activities?

ア.zh: 为了削减企业成本、改善产品质量和服务等，改进业务流程。
ア.en: Improve business processes in order to reduce a company's costs and enhance product quality and services.

イ.zh: 为了提高客户满意度，持续改进 IT 服务的质量。
イ.en: Continuously improve the quality of IT services in order to raise customer satisfaction.

ウ.zh: 梳理出信息资产，进行风险识别、分析及评价，并对信息资产进行管理。
ウ.en: Identify information assets, carry out risk identification, analysis, and evaluation, and manage the information assets.

エ.zh: 评估并改进产品与服务开发流程的成熟度。
エ.en: Assess and improve the maturity of the development process for products and services.
